urdu transliteration text: Karbala se jho kabhi ho ke hawa ati hai
english translation text: When the wind occasionally arrives from Karbala

urdu transliteration text:
Kisi Masoom ki jo ronay ki sada
ati hai
english translation text: It brings with it an Infallible's cries

urdu transliteration text: Kaun sota hai kinaray teray nehr-e-Furat?
english translation text: Who rests eternally by your riverbank, Euphrates?

urdu transliteration text: Teri mitti se abhi tak, kyun boo-e-wafa ati hai?
english translation text: Why does its land bear the fragrance of devotion?

urdu transliteration text: Maa samajhti hay dulhan laoon gi aaya hay shabab
english translation text: A mother had hoped to welcome a bride, she received a youth in his prime

urdu transliteration text:
Sheh samjhtay hain ke Akbar ki qaza aati hay
King (Hussain AS) knows that Akbar's martyrdom is near
Koyi beemar na parrhta ho tahajjud ki namaz
english translation text: Is there somebody sick praying the voluntary night namaz (Tahajjud)?

urdu transliteration text: Raat ko bairryon ki kyun ye sada aati hay
english translation text: Why do I hear the sounds of handcuffs, leg cuffs and chains in the middle of the night?

urdu transliteration text: Haan dharakta na ho marqad main kaheen qalb e Rubab
english translation text: I hope Rubab's (SA) heart doesn't tremble in her tomb

urdu transliteration text:
Ali Asghar, Ali Asghar ki sada aati hay
I hear someone crying "Ali Asghar, Ali Asghar"
Karbala se jho kabhi ho ke hawa ati hai
english translation text: When the wind occasionally arrives from Karbala
